name: Contact Higher Plane
description: The caster reaches toward the higher planes of existence (the referee) with yes-or-no questions. The higher the plane, the more questions, the likelier the knowledge, the truer the answers — and the greater the risk of madness. Insanity lasts one week per plane number contacted, the caster incapacitated throughout; casters above 11th level retain sanity 5% better per level. Usable once per game week (referee's option). Plane by plane (questions / chance known / veracity / insanity): 3rd 3/25%/30%/nil; 4th 4/30%/40%/10%; 5th 5/35%/50%/20%; 6th 6/40%/60%/30%; 7th 7/50%/70%/40%; 8th 8/60%/75%/50%; 9th 9/70%/80%/60%; 10th 10/80%/85%/70%; 11th 11/90%/90%/80%; 12th 12/95%/100%/90%.
